{{CargoRelic
|name=Koh-i-Noor Diamond
|rank=S
|affct=ART
|birthday=07-29
|source=ART Master Scrolls (34.7%), Fragment Crafting (18.1%), Lottery Machine (0.81%), Master Scrolls (6.5%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Wishing (0.68%)
|description=On Jul 29, 1895, Queen Victoria set this diamond on the Crown of Queen Elizabeth The Queen Mother.

This massive diamond inlaid on the Crown of Queen Elizabeth, the Koh-i-Noor, is a cursed one. Any man who owns it will rule the world but be cursed with terrible luck. Only a god or a woman can wear it and be safe. The Persian Emperor Nader Shah was assassinated after getting the diamond. Later, King George VI acquired it and died soon after!

[Basic Info]

Origin: Kola Mine, India<br>Type: Diamond<br>Weight: 108.93 carats<br>Estimated Value: $700,000<br>Curse: Brings bad luck to men
|fame=59
|art=98
|fth=65
|civ=62
|tech=48
|ss1=Snail HP +100<br>Snail DEF +10<br>Snail RUSH +10
|ss2=Snail HP +200<br>Snail DEF +20<br>Snail RUSH +20
|ss3=Snail HP +300<br>Snail DEF +30<br>Snail RUSH +30
|ss4=Snail HP +500<br>Snail DEF +50<br>Snail RUSH +50
|ss5=Snail HP +700<br>Snail DEF +70<br>Snail RUSH +70
|ss6=Snail HP + 1,000<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100
|ss7=Snail HP +1,000<br>Snail DEF +100<br>Snail RUSH +100<br>Snail DEF +100
|skill1=[[File:Britland skill III.png|frameless|52x52px]]Place in Britland Museum: In Britland, 2x Blue Card Drops +15%
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill III.png|frameless|53x53px]]Place in Exploration Compass: When exploring, 2x Blue Reagent Drops +15%
|skill3=[[File:Timemachine skill III.png|frameless|53x53px]]Place in Time Machine: Time Machine Max Cap +30%
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Britland Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Reagent Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Time Machine Skill]]
[[Category:Time Machine Output Boost]]
[[Category:DEF-Fungi Boost]]
[[Category:Gear Boost]]
[[Category:Minorino Boost]]
